lines: * The column was incorrectly storing profile.id instead of profile.public_id.
-     * 2. Migrate data by looking up profile.public_id from profile.id
+     * 1. Validate all records can be migrated (no orphaned profiles)
+     * 3. Migrate data by looking up profile.public_id from profile.id
+            // Step 1: Check for orphaned records BEFORE migration
+                LEFT JOIN "${publicSchema}"."profile" p ON s.profile_public_id = p.id
+                WHERE p.id IS NULL AND s.profile_public_id IS NOT NULL
+                    `Migration aborted: Found ${orphanedRecords[0].count} signature records with invalid profile_public_id. ` +
+                    `Clean up orphaned records before running this migration.`
-            // Step 2: Migrate data - lookup profile.public_id from profile.id
+            // Step 3: Migrate data - lookup profile.public_id from profile.id
-            // Step 3: Drop unique index that includes profile_public_id
+            // Step 4: Verify all records were migrated (no NULLs for non-NULL original values)
+                WHERE profile_public_id_new IS NULL AND profile_public_id IS NOT NULL
+                    `Migration failed: ${unmigrated[0].count} records still have NULL profile_public_id_new after migration`
+            // Step 5: Drop unique index that includes profile_public_id
-            // Step 4: Drop old index on profile_public_id
+            // Step 6: Drop old index on profile_public_id
-            // Step 6: Rename new column to profile_public_id
+            // Step 8: Rename new column to profile_public_id
-            // Step 7: Recreate index on profile_public_id (now UUID)
+            // Step 9: Set NOT NULL constraint to match model definition
+                    comment: 'FK to profiles.public_id - Person required to sign (UUID)',
+            // Step 10: Recreate index on profile_public_id (now UUID)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "idx_peo_employee_transfer_signatures_unique"
+            // Step 1: Check for orphaned records BEFORE rollback
+                LEFT JOIN "${publicSchema}"."profile" p ON s.profile_public_id = p.public_id
+                WHERE p.public_id IS NULL AND s.profile_public_id IS NOT NULL
+                    `Rollback aborted: Found ${orphanedRecords[0].count} signature records with invalid profile_public_id (UUID). ` +
+                    `Clean up orphaned records before rolling back this migration.`
-            // Step 2: Migrate data back - lookup profile.id from profile.public_id
+            // Step 3: Migrate data back - lookup profile.id from profile.public_id
+            // Step 4: Verify all records were migrated back
+                WHERE profile_public_id_old IS NULL AND profile_public_id IS NOT NULL
+                    `Rollback failed: ${unmigrated[0].count} records still have NULL profile_public_id_old after migration`
-            // Step 7: Recreate index on profile_public_id (now INTEGER)
+            // Step 9: Set NOT NULL constraint to match original model definition
+                    comment: 'FK to profiles.id - Person required to sign (INTEGER)',
+            // Step 10: Recreate index on profile_public_id (now INTEGER)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "idx_peo_employee_transfer_signatures_unique"
